tests.description: Tool succeeds on round 1 (LLM call), then interrupts on round 2 (next LLM call after seeing round-1 result). Tests that runPrompt's per-round branches stay isolated.

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: The output should be an array of 2 strings. The first should mention 'first-call-ok' (or contain the words first call ok). The second should be exactly 'second-call-ok' or contain that text. Pass if both calls' results are present in the array.
